mockPosts.title: Welcome to MyndBBS! Here is our design philosophy.
mockPosts.author: Admin
mockPosts.excerpt: We are building a clean, light, and secure forum. In this post, we discuss why we chose Next.js and how we implemented WebAuthn for passwordless login.

mockPosts.title: How to properly type Prisma queries in a monorepo?
mockPosts.author: DevGuy
mockPosts.excerpt: I'm struggling with sharing Prisma types between my backend and frontend packages. Does anyone have a good pattern for this?

mockPosts.title: Share your minimal desk setups for 2026
mockPosts.author: Minimalist
mockPosts.excerpt: Since we're all about that clean/light aesthetic here, let's see where you write your code. Post your desk photos below!
